cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So we have five golfers in a tournament: Amy, Mel, Rob, Joe, and Ada. The goal is to figure out their finishing positions based on the clues given and then determine which of the options (A to E) is correct. First, let me list out all the given information: 1. Joe finished second. 2. Joe finished below Amy. 3. Mel finished second-to-last. 4. Ada finished last. We need to arrange the five golfers from first to fifth place, using these clues.
